level_result_system.source_note: Each level has a report source and a door object for front-end inspection. Doors are internal navigation/output markers, not approval gates.

open_questions.question: Who would this help?
open_questions.weak_spot: Needs a little more natural detail from the user.

open_questions.question: What would a useful first version do?
open_questions.weak_spot: Needs a little more natural detail from the user.

open_questions.question: What part are you picturing most clearly right now?
open_questions.weak_spot: Needs a little more natural detail from the user.

open_questions.question: If this eventually made money, what feels like the most natural way that could happen?
Do you have any examples, references, notes, or past experiences that point toward this?
open_questions.weak_spot: No deep research or validated market proof in this dry run.

levels.boundary: Internal review only. No publishing, spending, credentials, webhooks, external accounts, backend storage, or bot authority changes.
levels.lovable_section: Saved ideas list opens a selected idea; the Library report action runs from the opened Idea Dashboard.

levels.report_summary: Prepare the project for R&D/product-direction work without losing the original clean packet, baseline, safety flags, or creator-control rules.
levels.lovable_section: Trunk review screen where Luma, Bloom, Vault, and Compass are shown as broad role-based contributors.

levels.report_summary: After Trunk research, treat The Clearing like a clean piece of paper: Moniker starts the project by naming the thing and setting URL direction early enough to guide logo, colors, font, brand tone, and later design work.
levels.n8n_anchor: 7.8. The Clearing: Prepare Project Name and URL Options
levels.lovable_section: The Clearing level card / naming door until a dedicated Clearing page exists.

levels.report_summary: Turn Library, Trunk, The Clearing, Lantern, Compass, Moniker, Ledger, Shield, and Echo inputs into a clear project foundation before Branchworks explores build/design options.

should_include: strengths, weak spots, missing decisions, and assumptions
money, growth, design, and direction-continuity notes
Branchworks-ready first questions and do-not-drift boundaries

levels.boundary: Canopy prepares internal planning only. It does not approve build, launch, spending, public claims, account actions, legal/trademark claims, domain purchase, or bot authority changes.
levels.n8n_anchor: 8. Canopy Level: Prepare Rook Foundation Packet
levels.lovable_section: Canopy level card / Rook foundation door until a dedicated Canopy page exists.

levels.owner: Chief / Echo / selected external scenario tool
levels.report_summary: Optional external processed-scenario level where a qualified idea gets quick Knowledge Prep, runs through an outside tool/company, then returns for Knowledge Review before Branchworks and the Build-A-Bears.

should_include: original source pointer or preserved idea reference
sanitized idea packet sent to the outside tool
outside prompt boundaries and do-not-include notes
features, assumptions, and missing pieces the outside tool introduced
Knowledge Review teardown notes comparing original idea, prep packet, and outside output
useful pieces to feed back into Treehouse
off-target, shallow, risky, or unsafe pieces to reject
comparison prompts for Tinker, Momma, and the Build-A-Bears

open_questions.question: Is this idea clear enough and safe enough for a sanitized external processed-scenario run?
open_questions.weak_spot: Wind Tunnel should not run on vague, private, sensitive, account-connected, or high-risk ideas.

open_questions.question: What quick Knowledge Prep is needed before an outside tool sees the idea?
open_questions.weak_spot: Wind Tunnel should not run from raw idea text alone; the prompt needs source preservation, boundaries, and do-not-include notes first.

open_questions.question: Which outside tool should process this idea for the current purpose?
open_questions.weak_spot: Abacus, Lovable, ChatLLM, or another tool may fit different idea types and cost/credit limits.

open_questions.question: What should Knowledge Review learn from the outside result before Branchworks and the Build-A-Bears?
open_questions.weak_spot: The outside result is evidence and comparison material, not authority or the project definition.

levels.boundary: Wind Tunnel is optional external-scenario processing only. It does not approve signup/login, subscription purchase, credit spending beyond approved tool use, external account access, private data sharing, deployment, publishing, automation activation, Lovable submission, final product direction, route/config/runtime changes, or bot authority changes.
levels.n8n_anchor: Candidate note: after Canopy quick prep and before Branchworks only when qualified; no live n8n node is active yet.

levels.report_summary: Turn the Rook/Canopy foundation plus any Knowledge-reviewed Wind Tunnel lessons into Bear-ready aligned experiment directions and a three-door Lovable preview concept while preserving closed gates.

should_include: Knowledge-reviewed Wind Tunnel lessons when available
Momma Bear master prompt preserving the three directions
Tinker final check result and closed-gate confirmation

levels.boundary: Branchworks prepares internal experiment/design direction only. It does not approve Lovable submission, build execution, deployment, public launch, spending, account access, backend setup, route/config/tool changes, final product selection, or bot authority changes.
levels.n8n_anchor: 8.5. Branchworks Level: Prepare Tinker Experiment Packet
levels.lovable_section: Branchworks level card / Tinker experiment door until a dedicated Branchworks page exists.

levels.report_summary: Turn Branchworks Bear directions and Tinker checks into one stronger prototype package, while preserving source choices and guarding against drift.
levels.boundary: Crown prepares an internal prototype package, Shield Final Boundary Pass, and next-level handoff only. It does not approve Lovable submission, build execution, deployment, public launch, spending, account access, backend setup, route/config/tool changes, live support activation, final product selection, or bot authority changes.
levels.n8n_anchor: 8.6. Crown Level: Prepare Weaver Prototype Package
levels.lovable_section: Crown level card / Weaver prototype door until a dedicated Crown page exists.

levels.report_summary: Have Ghost run end-stage simulations across the near-final Crown package / Da Crown Door experience before build handoff, owner review, public use, launch planning, or operational movement.
levels.boundary: The Sweep is simulation/reporting only. It does not approve Lovable submission, browser/computer-use automation, account access, production data use, public action, spending, deployment, code fixes, auto-merge, final product approval, route/config/tool changes, or bot authority changes.
levels.n8n_anchor: 8.7. The Sweep: Prepare Ghost Simulation Report
levels.lovable_section: Sweep level card / Ghost simulation report until a dedicated Sweep page exists.

levels.report_summary: Receive the swept project into its living home, define health and watch signals, keep it from going stale, and route the right helper when it needs care.

should_include: Anteater/Ant Watch Report input when available
project home/location and target surface status
forward growth opportunities and proposed additions
High Council review notes and routed fixes
version number update when meaningful changes are made

levels.boundary: Nest is project-home/watch/readiness guidance unless later approved as live operations. It does not approve cron automation, live support operations, support inboxes, public launch, spending, deployment, customer promises, production monitoring, account/channel/runtime/config changes, final product approval, or bot authority changes.
levels.n8n_anchor: 8.8. Nest Level: Prepare Ward Living Project Home
levels.lovable_section: Nest level card / Ward project-home door until a dedicated Nest page exists.

levels.report_summary: Turn the Living Seed Packet into a practical Seed Launch Packet so the strongest seeds can work at their best ability after the project has a home in Nest.

should_include: Senior Seed foundation notes for each baby seed
future Analytics/Stats placeholder only when clearly marked or backed by real data
Seed Admin Page sections and field notes

levels.boundary: Seed prepares launch/growth/distribution guidance plus internal/admin Seed Page and DaBotTree Admin Page concepts only. It does not approve public launch, posting, ads, spending, account access, email/message sends, customer promises, legal/commercial claims, automation, deployment, live support, final launch authority, public exposure of internal seed data, or bot authority changes.
levels.n8n_anchor: 8.9. Seed Level: Prepare Bloom Seed Launch Packet
levels.lovable_section: Seed level card / Bloom launch packet door until a dedicated Seed page exists.

needs_before_real_personal_project: current clean packet or intake payload
Boss approval before live n8n sync or Lovable submission
Wind Tunnel qualification, quick Knowledge Prep, Knowledge Review plan, and explicit tool-use approval before any external scenario run
visual_work_left_for_boss: final stage names if different from current n8n/Lovable names

level_result_system.authority_boundary: Internal metadata only. Does not activate n8n, connect accounts, submit Lovable prompts, deploy, publish, spend, or change runtime/config/authority.
